title: Provision for Balancing
full_text:
5.2.2.2 Provision for Balancing
Provision for Balancing
1) All air distribution systems shall be designed so that they can be balanced.
(See Note A-5.2.2.2.(1).)

sentences.text: All air distribution systems shall be designed so that they can be balanced. (See Note A-5.2.2.2.(1).)
